name: nftables
title: nftables
summary: Program to control packet filtering rules by Netfilter project
description:
Program to control packet filtering rules by Netfilter project
This software provides an in-kernel packet classification framework that is
based on a network-specific Virtual Machine (VM) and the nft userspace
command line tool. The nftables framework reuses the existing Netfilter
subsystems such as the existing hook infrastructure, the connection tracking
system, NAT, userspace queueing and logging subsystem.
.
nftables replaces the old popular iptables, ip6tables, arptables and ebtables.
.
Netfilter software and nftables in particular are used in applications such
as Internet connection sharing, firewalls, IP accounting, transparent
proxying, advanced routing and traffic control.
.
A Linux kernel >= 3.13 is required. However, >= 4.14 is recommended.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use nft because Program to control packet filtering rules by Netfilter project.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use nft as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nft [ -nNscaeSupyjtT ] [ -I directory ] [ -f filename | -i | cmd ...]` as documented upstream for nft.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nft -h` as documented upstream for nft.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nft -v` as documented upstream for nft.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair nft with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `nft --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: nft - Administration tool of the nftables framework for packet filtering and classification
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install nftables (1.1.6-1). Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `nft [ -nNscaeSupyjtT ] [ -I directory ] [ -f filename | -i | cmd ...]`. Further invocations from upstream: `nft -h`; `nft -v`. Program to control packet filtering rules by Netfilter project.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Program to control packet filtering rules by Netfilter project.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: nft - Administration tool of the nftables framework for packet filtering and classification.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install nftables (1.1.6-1)
Install with: sudo apt install nftables (1.1.6-1)
